---
title: "Location"
---

Gefeiert wird im Kranwerk Naunhof.

Lutherstraße 10  
04683 Naunhof

[kranwerk.com](https://www.kranwerk.com/)



<!-- Official Open Street Map emdedding does not support label or address, just a marker -->

<div class="map-container">
  <iframe
    src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=12.589470417113893%2C51.27505271434776%2C12.599470417113893%2C51.28505271434776&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=51.279981198521206%2C12.59394496679306"
    frameborder="0"
    scrolling="no"
    style="border: 1px solid black">
  </iframe>
</div>
